query:
-- How many unmatched services have a phone that exists in phone_numbers (with customer)?
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT u.externalId) AS potential_matches
FROM services u
JOIN phone_numbers pn ON pn.number = REPLACE(u.phoneNumber, ' ', '')
WHERE (u.customerExternalId IS NULL OR u.customerExternalId = '')
  AND pn.customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND pn.customerExternalId != '';

-- Also try matching via phone_numbers.serviceExternalId -> matched service
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT u.externalId) AS via_service_link
FROM services u
JOIN phone_numbers pn ON REPLACE(u.phoneNumber, ' ', '') = pn.number
JOIN services s ON s.externalId = pn.serviceExternalId
  AND s.customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND s.customerExternalId != ''
WHERE (u.customerExternalId IS NULL OR u.customerExternalId = '');

-- How many unmatched services have a phone that exists in phone_numbers (with customer)?
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT u.externalId) AS potential_matches
FROM services u
JOIN phone_numbers pn ON pn.number = REPLACE(u.phoneNumber, ' ', '')
WHERE (u.customerExternalId IS NULL OR u.customerExternalId = '')
  AND pn.customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND pn.customerExternalId != '';

-- Also try matching via phone_numbers.serviceExternalId -> matched service
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT u.externalId) AS via_service_link
FROM services u
JOIN phone_numbers pn ON REPLACE(u.phoneNumber, ' ', '') = pn.number
JOIN services s ON s.externalId = pn.serviceExternalId
  AND s.customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND s.customerExternalId != ''
WHERE (u.customerExternalId IS NULL OR u.customerExternalId = '');
